parents.subject: LU-18222 quota: add LQA directory-based record management

commit.subject: LU-18222 tests: add MDS restart to test_97c
commit.message:
LU-18222 tests: add MDS restart to test_97c

Add MDS restart functionality to test_97c to verify that LQA quota
limits are preserved correctly across MDS restarts, similar to the
approach used in test_97d.
This change helps catch regressions where LQA quota settings might
be lost or corrupted during MDS restart operations.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-quota env=ONLY=97c
Signed-off-by: Artem Blagodarenko <ablagodarenko@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ied1c1a9e2d50931b18198860770992507964bee6
